ValidationRule.description: Red Flag Notes are mandatory when Health_Check_Status__c is set to Red.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Health_Check_Status__c = "Red - Will Not Complete Today", ISBLANK(Red_Flag_Notes__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Red Flag Notes are required when marking a health check Red. Describe specifically why the job will not complete today, what has been completed, and what remains. Scheduling and your manager will be notified immediately.
